signatures.label: NestFactory.create(module: Type, options?: NestApplicationOptions): Promise<INestApplication>
signatures.documentation: Creates a new NestJS application instance from the given root module.

parameters.label: module: Type
parameters.documentation: The root module class (usually AppModule).

parameters.label: options?: NestApplicationOptions
parameters.documentation: Optional application settings: cors, bodyParser, httpsOptions, logger.

signatures.label: app.listen(port: number, hostname?: string): Promise<void>
signatures.documentation: Starts the HTTP server listening on the specified port.

parameters.label: port: number
parameters.documentation: The port number to listen on.

parameters.label: hostname?: string
parameters.documentation: Optional hostname to bind to (default: all interfaces).

signatures.label: app.useGlobalPipes(...pipes: PipeTransform[]): void
signatures.documentation: Registers global pipes that apply to every route handler.

parameters.label: ...pipes: PipeTransform[]
parameters.documentation: Pipe instances to register globally. Common: new ValidationPipe().

signatures.label: app.useGlobalGuards(...guards: CanActivate[]): void
signatures.documentation: Registers global guards that apply to every route.

parameters.label: ...guards: CanActivate[]
parameters.documentation: Guard instances to register globally.

parameters.label: ...interceptors: NestInterceptor[]
parameters.documentation: Interceptor instances to register globally.

parameters.label: ...filters: ExceptionFilter[]
parameters.documentation: Exception filter instances to register globally.

parameters.label: options?: CorsOptions
parameters.documentation: CORS configuration options: origin, methods, allowedHeaders, credentials.

signatures.label: ConfigService.get<T>(propertyPath: string, defaultValue?: T): T
signatures.documentation: Retrieves a configuration value by path. Supports dot notation for nested values.

parameters.label: propertyPath: string
parameters.documentation: The configuration property path (e.g., 'database.host').

parameters.label: defaultValue?: T
parameters.documentation: Default value if the property is not found.

signatures.label: TypeOrmModule.forRoot(options?: TypeOrmModuleOptions): DynamicModule
signatures.documentation: Registers TypeORM with the provided connection options.

parameters.label: options?: TypeOrmModuleOptions
parameters.documentation: Database connection options: type, host, port, username, password, database, entities, synchronize.

signatures.label: TypeOrmModule.forFeature(entities: EntityClassOrSchema[]): DynamicModule
signatures.documentation: Registers the given entities for use in the current module scope.

parameters.label: entities: EntityClassOrSchema[]
parameters.documentation: Array of entity classes to register as repositories.

signatures.label: JwtService.sign(payload: object, options?: JwtSignOptions): string
signatures.documentation: Signs a JWT token with the given payload.

parameters.label: payload: object
parameters.documentation: The JWT payload data.

parameters.label: options?: JwtSignOptions
parameters.documentation: Options: secret, expiresIn, algorithm, etc.

signatures.label: JwtService.verify<T>(token: string, options?: JwtVerifyOptions): T
signatures.documentation: Verifies and decodes a JWT token.

parameters.label: token: string
parameters.documentation: The JWT token string to verify.

parameters.label: options?: JwtVerifyOptions
parameters.documentation: Options: secret, algorithms, ignoreExpiration.

signatures.label: Test.createTestingModule(metadata: ModuleMetadata): TestingModuleBuilder
signatures.documentation: Creates a testing module for unit and integration tests.

parameters.label: metadata: ModuleMetadata
parameters.documentation: Module metadata: imports, controllers, providers.

signatures.label: moduleRef.get<T>(typeOrToken: Type<T> | string | symbol): T
signatures.documentation: Retrieves an instance of a provider from the module reference.

parameters.label: typeOrToken: Type<T> | string | symbol
parameters.documentation: The class type or injection token.

signatures.label: new ValidationPipe(options?: ValidationPipeOptions)
signatures.documentation: Creates a new validation pipe with the specified options.

parameters.label: options?: ValidationPipeOptions
parameters.documentation: Options: whitelist, forbidNonWhitelisted, transform, disableErrorMessages, exceptionFactory.

signatures.label: new HttpException(response: string | object, status: HttpStatus, options?: HttpExceptionOptions)

parameters.label: response: string | object
parameters.documentation: The error message or response object.

parameters.label: status: HttpStatus
parameters.documentation: The HTTP status code.

parameters.label: options?: HttpExceptionOptions
parameters.documentation: Optional: cause, description.
